stemHtml:
Which of the following statements is an interpretation of the SIGMET ?

LGGG SIGMET 3 VALID 121420/121820 LGAT-
ATHINAI FIR EMBD TS OBS AND FCST IN W OF ATHINAI FIR / MOV E / INTST NC

options.a: The thunderstorms in the Athens FIR are increasing in intensity, but are stationary above the western part of the Athens FIR
options.b: Thunderstorms have formed in the eastern part of the Athens FIR and are slowly moving west
options.c: Thunderstorms must be expected in the western part of the Athens FIR. The thunderstorm zone is moving east. Intensity is constant
options.d: Athens Airport is closed due to thunderstorms. The thunderstorm zone should be east of Athens by 18:20 UTC
